reviews.comment:
Increíble que el ACA, NO tengan aceite!! Solo había 1 litro de un solo aceite que me cobraron $ 25.000.- una locura!!!! Y además fui atendido de muy mala gana. Si pueden eviten ir a ese lugar!!

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) doesn't have oil!! They only had one liter of a single type of oil, and they charged me $25,000—outrageous! And on top of that, the service was incredibly rude. If you can, avoid that place!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqd05mWExBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention and good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEbnRlZ3JBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. En los momentos de máxima afluencia de público no reciben tarjetas ni medios electrónicos de pago. Hay que ir con efectivo. Los baños terriblemente sucios. Cero servicio al cliente. Se abusan de que son los únicos en la zona.
El ACA deberia sacarles la concesión

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. During peak hours, they don't accept cards or electronic payments. You have to bring cash. The bathrooms are filthy. Zero customer service. They take advantage of being the only ones in the area. The ACA should revoke their concession.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEcnJxdDRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo lo necesario de una estacion de servicio, mucho no se puede pedir. Eso si, no tenian ni un balde para limpiar los vidrios, y cuando le pregunte la clave de wifi el playero me contesto que no sabia...

(Translated by Google)
Everything you'd expect from a gas station, you can't ask for much more. However, they didn't even have a bucket for cleaning windshields, and when I asked the attendant for the Wi-Fi password, he said he didn't know it...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEcUlLbTlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la última bomba bencinera  antes de pasar de Argentina a chile, tienen para comprar comida y souvenirs

(Translated by Google)
It's the last gas station before crossing from Argentina into Chile; they have places to buy food and souvenirs.
